description: Statement graphic on a deep navy-blue textured background. Centered at top is the grey translucent circular seal of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security (eagle emblem ringed by 'U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY') above large grey 'ICE' lettering, with a thin dark-red horizontal rule beneath. Below in white serif type is the headline 'Statement by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement' followed by the quoted statement: '“U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement, along with federal partners, including the FBI, ATF, DEA, CBP and the U.S. Marshals Service, began conducting enhanced targeted operations today in Chicago to enforce U.S. immigration law and preserve public safety and national security by keeping potentially dangerous criminal aliens out of our communities.”'
notable_text: Statement by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement — 'began conducting enhanced targeted operations today in Chicago ... keeping potentially dangerous criminal aliens out of our communities.'
